summary: Update mode testing complete. CRITICAL BUG FIX VERIFIED: Smart RTL button no longer crashes when toggled during active simulation. All 21 backend tests passed, all 24 frontend tests passed (12 map-simulation, 7 core-flows, 5 route-history). Additional 3 specific bug fix verification tests passed. Drone color change to #D3D3D3 confirmed visually.
seed_data_creation: Test routes created dynamically with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after each test
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Smart RTL simulation features tested and working. Bug fix verified: rtlPathRef.current null reference error no longer occurs when toggling Smart RTL during active simulation. Fix was in SimpleMap3D.js simulation loop - added early return after progress reset + safe null guard for rtlPathRef.current access. Drone color updated to #D3D3D3 (light grey). Ukrainian UI fully functional.

bug_fix_verification.issue: Cannot read properties of null (reading 'returnPath') when clicking Smart RTL during simulation
bug_fix_verification.root_cause: In SimpleMap3D.js, after resetting progressRef to 0 at end of simulation loop, the code would immediately try to access rtlPathRef.current.returnPath without null checking
bug_fix_verification.fix_applied: Added early return after progress reset + safe null guard: if (isRTL && rtlPathRef.current) before accessing rtlPathRef.current properties
verification_tests: Start normal simulation → toggle Smart RTL → no crash
Smart RTL simulation runs through all phases without error
Multiple rapid Smart RTL toggles during simulation do not crash

changes_tested.drone_color: #D3D3D3 - visually confirmed light grey drone visible in 3D scene
changes_tested.smart_rtl_fix: Null reference crash fixed - verified with multiple test scenarios
changes_tested.existing_features: All existing functionality working - tabs, simulation, speed slider, HUD overlay, route history, telemetry, documentation
